items.name: Winged Blade of the Frigid
items.description: A chilling masterpiece in ice-blue steel, slicing through the air with frosty precision. Adorned with frosted wings, it embodies the frigid embrace. Unleash this frozen sword to command the icy cold and send shivers down your foes' spines.

items.name: Winged Blade of the Toxins
items.description: A venomous masterpiece in emerald-green steel, cutting through with toxic precision. Adorned with wings that echo the poison's allure, it embodies the essence of toxins. Unleash this poison-laden sword to command venomous power and sow dread in your foes' hearts.
